questions.prompt: My sister ______ the piano every evening.
There ______ five guitars in the practice room.
We have ______ old piano in our living room.
My cousins ______ very good singers.
The music club meets ______ Friday evenings.
Last Saturday we ______ our new song for two hours.
The drums are ______ than the violin, so we use a separate room.
Next month my brother ______ buy a second-hand keyboard.
While I ______ my homework, my sister was practising her scales.
Ravi is very good ______ playing the flute.
I ______ the guitar since I was twelve years old.
If enough members sign up, the club ______ a second choir in April.
If I ______ read music, I would join the college orchestra.
All the songs for the show ______ by students last year.
You ______ warm up your voice before you sing, or you may damage it.
The app ______ I use for tuning my guitar is completely free.
If we ______ the tickets earlier, we would have got seats at the front.
The teacher told us that the audition ______ postponed until the following week.
I wish I ______ sing as beautifully as my grandmother.
We had the old piano ______ before the summer concert.
______ having very little stage experience, she was chosen as the lead singer.
Not until the final rehearsal ______ we realise how much work was left.
If he hadn't taken those lessons as a child, he ______ a professional musician today.
It was the drummer ______ suggested changing the ending of the song.
The recording sounds very odd — the microphone ______ have been faulty.
Choose the word from the bank that has the same meaning as each word below.
Match each music word with its definition.

bank: a practice session held before a performance
the people who watch or listen to a performance
a place where an event is held
an object used to produce musical sounds
a printed programme listing the performers
a person who writes music for films
the cost of entry to a concert
a short break in the middle of a show
a machine that records and stores sound

answers: a practice session held before a performance
the people who watch or listen to a performance
a place where an event is held
an object used to produce musical sounds

questions.prompt: Choose the word from the bank that best completes each sentence.

items.text: The band will ______ their new song at the school concert next month.
You should always ______ your guitar before you start playing.
We ______ for two hours every Thursday in the week before a show.
You can ______ the sheet music from the club website for free.
Members must ______ for the summer course before the end of May.

questions.prompt: Choose the word from the bank that goes with each verb to make a common expression.
Match each word about music technology with the phrase that explains it.

bank: listening to music over the internet without saving it
a list of songs chosen to be played in order
a device worn over the ears for private listening
a regular payment that gives continued access to a service
to send a file from your own device to the internet
a small speaker placed in the corner of a room
a paper ticket bought at the door of a concert
the person who controls sound levels at a live show
a copy of a song made in a recording studio
to reduce the volume of a piece of music

answers: listening to music over the internet without saving it
a list of songs chosen to be played in order
a device worn over the ears for private listening
a regular payment that gives continued access to a service
to send a file from your own device to the internet
